title: Adios Vaya Con Dios
overview: A gritty urban thriller inspired by real events. Go With God is the story of two friends within the world of Chicago’s Latino street gangs. With the city simmering – a day of reckoning approaches for Rory, a rising Irish-Mexican street lieutenant for the Olmec street gang when his trusted life-long friend Eloy, comes home from prison.  Tensions rise as Eloy dives right back into the chaotic crucible of violence and retribution that engulfs their neighborhood putting both their friendship and loyalty to each other to the test.
